privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic travel agency database (demodb) based on OrientDB's official DemoDB schema. Hotel Artemide is a real 4-star boutique hotel in Rome, Italy (Via Nazionale 22, verified via Tripadvisor and official websites). John Smith and Maria Garcia are synthetic test profiles created for the task, using example.com email addresses (reserved domain for documentation). The target date is 2023-12-25 (Christmas Day). The task requires creating a custom 'PotentialCompanion' edge class to link users who reviewed the same hotel on the same date.
